summary: Make asparagus a weekly salmon-day treat and use cheap Euromix daily
description: The daily asparagus portion still feels expensive. Keep Muscle Meat broccoli daily, use inexpensive Muscle Meat Euromix on six chicken days, and reserve 100g green asparagus for the salmon day. Regenerate day-specific nutrition/cost profiles and update the live article.
acceptance: Chicken day uses 250g Muscle Meat broccoli plus 250g €0.60 Euromix; salmon day uses 250g broccoli plus 100g asparagus; generated daily/weekly costs and nutrients match the live UI.
verification: python3 scripts/omad-v04-nutrition.py --check && npm test && npm run check && npm run check:seo && git diff --check

evidence.summary: Daily Muscle Meat Euromix 250g costs €0.60 and asparagus is reserved for weekly salmon day; chicken day €8.76, 6+1 week €63.92, 30-day €273.94; nutrition regenerated; 55 tests/site/SEO green; all three UI profile tabs and zero overflow verified.
